data.title: Tritax Big Box Announces Q3 Interim Dividend
data.description:
Tritax Big Box REIT (GB:BBOX) has released an update.

Tritax Big Box REIT plc has announced an interim dividend of 1.825 pence per share for the third quarter of 2024, with payments set for late November to shareholders registered by early November. This dividend represents 25% of the previous year’s total and aligns with the company’s policy to distribute over 90% of adjusted earnings. Tritax, a leader in UK logistics real estate, continues to manage a significant investment portfolio with a focus on sustainability and strategic asset management.

For further insights into GB:BBOX stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Octopus AIM VCT 2 Announces Share Buyback
data.description:
Octopus AIM VCT 2 (GB:OSEC) has released an update.

Octopus AIM VCT 2 plc has recently bought back 514,128 of its own ordinary shares for cancellation, at a price of 40.8p each. This buyback has resulted in a new total of 185,173,739 ordinary shares, which also represents the company’s total voting rights. Shareholders can use this information to assess any changes in their stake in the company as per the Financial Conduct Authority’s rules.

For further insights into GB:OSEC stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: West Oak Gold Transforms into Silicon Metals Corp.
data.description:
West Oak Gold Corp. (TSE:WO) has released an update.

West Oak Gold Corp. has officially changed its name to Silicon Metals Corp., complete with a new CUSIP number and stock symbol ‘SI’, commencing trading under these on October 11th, 2024. The company welcomes Andrew Brown as the new Corporate Secretary and has engaged Omni8 Global to enhance their corporate marketing and investor relations strategies over a seven-month period.

For further insights into TSE:WO stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Agronomics Exec Chair Bolsters Share Ownership
data.description:
Agronomics Limited (GB:ANIC) has released an update.

Jim Mellon, Executive Chair of Agronomics Limited, a pioneer in cellular agriculture investment, has increased his stake in the company by purchasing 1,000,000 additional shares at 4.92 pence each. His total ownership now amounts to 15.76% of the company, with shares held both directly and through his ownership of Galloway Limited and Shellbay Investments Limited. This strategic move underlines Mellon’s confidence in Agronomics’ mission to transform agriculture through technologies that offer sustainable alternatives to traditional animal-derived products.

For further insights into GB:ANIC stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
data.author: TipRanks UK Auto-Generated Newsdesk

data.title: Silver Bullet Stakeholder Spreadex Adjusts Voting Rights
data.description:
Silver Bullet Data Services Group plc (GB:SBDS) has released an update.

Silver Bullet Data Services Group has experienced a change in significant shareholdings, with Spreadex LTD reporting a decrease in voting rights from 5.5675% to 4.5374% as of October 9, 2024. The adjustment reflects Spreadex LTD’s disposal of shares and minor changes in financial instruments, resulting in their holding of 792,936 voting rights in the company. This shift in shareholder dynamics may interest investors monitoring Silver Bullet’s stakeholder landscape.

For further insights into GB:SBDS stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: SSE Director Increases Stake Under Incentive Plan
data.description:
SSE (GB:SSE) has released an update.

SSE PLC has announced that under its Share Incentive Plan, director Barry O’Regan acquired a total of 18 new ordinary shares at a price of €22.08556 each on 8 October 2024. This transaction, which is part of the company’s all-employee share scheme, was conducted on the London Stock Exchange. The purchase included both partnership and matching shares, reinforcing the director’s vested interest in the company’s performance.

For further insights into GB:SSE stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Mobile Tornado COO Ups Stake in Company
data.description:
Mobile Tornado (GB:MBT) has released an update.

Mobile Tornado Group’s COO, Luke Wilkinson, has bolstered his investment in the company by purchasing 680,000 ordinary shares at an average price of 1.438p per share, raising his stake to 0.49% of the total issued share capital. This transaction reflects confidence from senior management in the company’s future, as insider purchases are often viewed positively by the market. The shares were acquired on the London Stock Exchange on October 10, 2024.

For further insights into GB:MBT stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Hunting PLC Announces Interim Dividend Payment
data.description:
Hunting (GB:HTG) has released an update.

Hunting PLC, a global precision engineering group listed on the London Stock Exchange, has announced the payment of its 2024 interim dividend at 4.2004 pence per share after currency conversion from dollars to sterling. The rate was set using the average exchange rate from October 8 to 10, 2024, with the dividend payable to shareholders on October 25, 2024. Hunting’s diverse operations span across multiple continents and it reports financials in US dollars across various segments and product groups.

For further insights into GB:HTG stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
data.author: TipRanks UK Auto-Generated Newsdesk

data.title: Xtract Resources Partners for Zambian Mining Exploration
data.description:
Xtract Resources (GB:XTR) has released an update.

Xtract Resources Plc has entered into a collaboration agreement with Chilibwe Mining Limited to explore and develop a sizeable exploration licence in Zambia. Under the agreement, Xtract will assist in preparing a work programme and obtaining project funding, earning a 25% stake in the project without any initial funding commitment. The licence area is strategically located near major mining operations and has historical exploration data that Xtract is currently evaluating.

For further insights into GB:XTR stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Pembroke VCT Director Buys Shares
data.description:
Pembroke VCT (GB:PEMB) has released an update.

Pembroke VCT PLC has announced an initial notification of a transaction involving the purchase of B ordinary shares by company director Louise Wolfson. The transaction, which took place on the London Stock Exchange, involved the acquisition of 9,920 shares at a price of £1.0081 each on October 9, 2024. This financial move signifies active managerial participation in the company’s equity.

For further insights into GB:PEMB stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
